narrative:
Highland County has 26,974 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.2% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -12.5% D−R vs -32.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
